text.title: LinkedIn Ads Campaign Strategy Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the methodology applied to a realistic scenario, including the produced artefact.

example.description: ACME SaaS, $28k LTV, ABM list of 500 mid-market US companies. Goal: 40 MQLs/quarter at cost-per-MQL ≤ $80.
example.note: ICP-fit gate passed, matched-list seeded, format matches MOFU, KPI tied to MQL not CPL.
